title: Climax
description: Modpack with all of the mods for the Climax SMP 2
body:
All mods are intended for The Climax SMP. Primarily mods addidng smaller additions, with a few exceptions such as create to add a form of tech mod. This modpack is intended to provide an up-to-date mods list, to move away from just using a zip file in Google Drive. (It makes it easier both for the players and the server hosts).

 
Mainly includes tech and gear mods, to create the optimal conditions for war, trade, and just general elements of a nation server.

All versions of the modpack from before Season 4 are available exclusively on our Curseforge page, due to licensing issues.

## Recommended Resource Packs

Axolotl Bucket Variants https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/axolotl-bucket-variants

Vanilla Tweaks (Not Included): https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/
